voiceNote: Brisk, efficient, respectful of the patient's time. Not chatty.
openingText: Hi Sarah, this is Mia calling from YOUR Practice. Quick call to confirm your appointment with Dr. Reeves this Thursday at two. Does that still work for you?

branches.label: Yes, confirmed.
branches.responseText: Great, you're confirmed for Thursday at two with Dr. Reeves. I'll text a reminder the day before. Anything else you need?

branches.label: Actually, can we reschedule?
branches.responseText: Happy to. Dr. Reeves has Friday at ten or Monday at three available next week. Which works better?

branches.label: I need to cancel, sorry.
branches.responseText: Not a problem. Would you like me to put you on the waitlist for next week in case an earlier slot opens, or just cancel outright?

branches.label: Friday at ten.
branches.responseText: Done. You're now on for Friday at ten with Dr. Reeves. I'll send the update to your portal and a reminder the day before. Anything else?

branches.label: Monday at three.
branches.responseText: Done. You're now on for Monday at three with Dr. Reeves. I'll send the update to your portal and a reminder the day before. Anything else?

branches.label: Neither works. Something later?
branches.responseText: Of course. I'll put you on the waitlist for next week and I'll also send over a link to our full calendar so you can pick anything that fits. Anything else for now?

branches.label: Put me on the waitlist.
branches.responseText: Done. You're on the waitlist for next week, and I'll call if something opens up. Anything else?

branches.label: Just cancel, thanks.
branches.responseText: Cancelled. You'll get a confirmation in your portal. Whenever you're ready to rebook, text us or book through the portal. Take care, Sarah.

branches.label: Actually, can you just reschedule it?
branches.responseText: Absolutely. Dr. Reeves has Friday at ten or Monday at three open next week. Which works?

branches.label: Can I get a virtual visit instead?
branches.responseText: Yes, I can switch this to telehealth. I'll text you the video link before your appointment. Anything else?

branches.label: Can you text me the directions?
branches.responseText: On the way. You'll get a text with the address, parking notes, and the suite number. Take care.

end-done.label: Handled
end-done.proofPoint: That call takes your front desk four to six minutes. Multiply by 30 patients a day. Mia does all of them before your staff clocks in.

end-cancelled.label: Cancelled
end-cancelled.proofPoint: Even cancellations don't get wasted. Mia offers the waitlist, logs the reason, and flags rebook windows so nothing slips.
